inputTitle: Scan a draft for hidden Unicode characters
inputDescription: Paste text to surface zero-width marks, bidi controls, and stealth spacing before they leak into production.
inputPlaceholder: Paste text, email copy, code samples, or imported content…
filtersDescription: Focus on the categories you want to inspect in this pass.
emptyStateDescription: The checker will flag invisible characters, show where they appear, and prepare a cleaned copy.
resultsDescription: Review what was detected, compare cleaned and annotated text, and inspect each finding.
noIssuesLabel: No invisible characters in the selected categories.
